name: Mode Switcher
description: Agent running mode switching with exit gate and plan artifact (code / plan)

tools.name: switchMode
tools.description: Switch the agent running mode. Available modes: "code" (default execution with full tools) and "plan" (read-only planning mode). In plan mode, the first switch back to code triggers an exit review gate; call again after review to complete the transition.

mode.description: The target mode to switch to.

tools.name: upsertSessionPlan
tools.description: Create or update the session plan artifact. The plan must contain all required headings: Context, Goal, Scope, Non-Goals, Existing Code To Reuse, Implementation Steps, Verification, Open Questions. Only available in plan mode.

content.description: The full plan content in markdown. Must include all required headings.
